title: Rust hetero_node packet_hash logging vs storage inconsistency
description: In lichen-apps/src/bin/hetero_node.rs, metrics use 16-byte hash_prefix for HashSet (lines 146,177: hash[..16] as [u8;16]), but JSON 'packet_hash' and tx_id use hex string slice [..16] (8 bytes equiv, line 114). Inconsistent with Python's 32-char hex and the standardization goal. New bug from codereview pass after Python edit.
